description: Спецификации двухпанельного макета хранилища для PassGen (согласно ТЗ раздел 6.3)

characteristics: Tap on item → Detail screen (new page)
Left pane (40%): Password list with search/filter
No navigation on item tap (selection only)
Middle pane (280dp): Password list with search/filter

searchField.flutter:
TextField(
  decoration: InputDecoration(
    hintText: 'Поиск...',
    prefixIcon: Icon(Icons.search),
    border: OutlineInputBorder(),
  ),
  onChanged: (value) => controller.setSearchQuery(value),
)

categoryFilter.flutter:
DropdownButton<int?>(
  value: controller.selectedCategoryId,
  items: [
    DropdownMenuItem(value: null, child: Text('Все категории')),
    ...categories.map((cat) => DropdownMenuItem(
      value: cat.id,
      child: Text('${cat.icon} ${cat.name}'),
    )),
  ],
  onChanged: (value) => controller.setCategoryFilter(value),
)

service.label: Сервис
service.flutter:
TextFormField(
  decoration: InputDecoration(
    labelText: 'Сервис',
    prefixIcon: Icon(Icons.business),
  ),
  controller: serviceController,
  readOnly: true,
)

login.label: Логин
login.flutter:
TextFormField(
  decoration: InputDecoration(
    labelText: 'Логин',
    prefixIcon: Icon(Icons.person),
  ),
  controller: loginController,
  readOnly: true,
)

password.label: Пароль
password.flutter:
TextFormField(
  decoration: InputDecoration(
    labelText: 'Пароль',
    prefixIcon: Icon(Icons.lock),
    suffixIcon: Row(
      mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min,
      children: [
        IconButton(
          icon: Icon(_obscurePassword ? Icons.visibility : Icons.visibility_off),
          onPressed: () => setState(() => _obscurePassword = !_obscurePassword),
        ),
        IconButton(
          icon: Icon(Icons.copy),
          onPressed: () => copyPassword(),
        ),
      ],
    ),
  ),
  controller: passwordController,
  obscureText: _obscurePassword,
)

category.label: Категория
category.flutter:
DropdownButton<int>(
  value: categoryId,
  items: categories.map((cat) => DropdownMenuItem(
    value: cat.id,
    child: Text('${cat.icon} ${cat.name}'),
  )).toList(),
  onChanged: (value) => controller.updateCategory(value),
)

edit.label: Редактировать
edit.onPressed: Enable edit mode or open dialog

selection.flutter:
AnimatedContainer(
  duration: Duration(milliseconds: 200),
  color: isSelected ? theme.colorScheme.primaryContainer : Colors.transparent,
  child: ListTile(...),
)

paneTransition.flutter:
AnimatedSwitcher(
  duration: Duration(milliseconds: 300),
  switchInCurve: Curves.easeInOut,
  switchOutCurve: Curves.easeInOut,
  child: isTablet ? TwoPaneLayout() : MobileLayout(),
)

flutterImplementation.desktop:
Row(
  children: [
    NavigationRail(...),
    VerticalDivider(thickness: 1, width: 1),
    SizedBox(
      width: 280,
      child: PasswordList(...),
    ),
    VerticalDivider(thickness: 1, width: 1),
    Expanded(
      child: Center(
        child: ConstrainedBox(
          constraints: BoxConstraints(maxWidth: 800),
          child: selectedEntry != null
              ? PasswordDetail(entry: selectedEntry)
              : EmptyState(),
        ),
      ),
    ),
  ],
)
